name: Release notes v.3.5.0 - Franchise Connect
body:
Release notes v.3.5.0 - Franchise Connect

Release version: 3.5.0 | Release Date: 20 May 2019

Below is a list of resolutions included in the latest Maintenance Release. Click here to view all Franchise Connect Release Notes. 

AreaDetails
Duplicate a productWhen duplicating a product the Global ID is no longer copied to the new product
Product Sales ReportThe setting "Only Exclude Products With both Zero Sales And Zero Stock On Hand (Available + On-Order)" now excludes products with both zero sales and zero stock on hand, where previously it was incorrectly excluding products with zero sale or zero stock on hand.
